about.title: about me
about.description:
UI designer and frontend developer
with graphic design background
based in Łódź - central Poland.

services.title: skills
services.description:
From concept to finished product. I design clear interfaces and implement them into working websites and applications.
I combine UX, aesthetics, and code to quickly transform an idea into a product that works and looks great.

services.title: design
services.description: Starting from scratch, I can design your brand, define your goal analysis, user flow, information architecture, and usability. I can design a consistent style for all graphics, and create user-friendly, responsive interfaces.

services.title: code
services.description:
As a front-end developer, I have experience building websites, web, mobile, and desktop applications.
Depending on the needs, I create a digital, scalable product that fit seamlessly with brand design.

educations.title: bio
educations.description: Graphic design and programming have been my passions for years. I wanted more than just aesthetics, so after graduating in graphic design, I decided to combine both passions by creating interactive interfaces. This combination gives me the ability to bring the entire project to life, providing users with digital experiences that are not only beautiful but also intuitive, functional, and user-centric.

educations.title: education
educations.description: 2024 - Bachelor's degree in computer graphics at the Academy of Humanities and Economics in Łódź
